Subjunctive: The Six Irregulars

While most subjunctive forms come from the 'yo' form, there are six verbs that are completely irregular. Use the mnemonic DISISH to remember them.

DISISH Verbs

  • Dar (dé, des, dé...)
  • Ir (vaya, vayas, vaya...)
  • Ser (sea, seas, sea...)
  • Ir (Wait, the second I is for Ir again or just a mnemonic? Usually it's Dar, Ir, Ser, Haber, Estar, Saber)
  • Let's list them properly below.

The Big Six

Verb Subj. Form (yo)
Dar dé
Ir vaya
Ser sea
Haber haya
Estar esté
Saber sepa
